project_type: Self-contained HTML/CSS/JS astrological marriage matching application
build_system: None - static HTML files opened directly in browser
test_framework: Manual browser testing - open index.html in browser
test_command: Open index.html in browser and verify all tabs render correctly
verification_instructions: 1. Open index.html in a browser. 2. Verify all tabs are present and navigable. 3. Enter sample birth details and verify calculations render. 4. Test PDF export functionality.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - open index.html in any modern browser
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - can use CDN links for libraries like html2pdf.js, jspdf, etc.
contribution_requirements: All code should be self-contained in HTML/CSS/JS files in the repository root
key_patterns: Single-page application with tab-based navigation. All astrological logic implemented in JavaScript.
relevant_files: index.html - main entry point with tab UI
js/astro-core.js - core astronomical/astrological calculations (planetary positions, house cusps)
js/bphs.js - BPHS house significations and assessment
js/dasha.js - Vimshottari Dasha calculations and timeline
js/app.js - Main application controller, UI interactions
directory_structure: / - root contains index.html; /css/ - stylesheets; /js/ - JavaScript modules
